name: sutra
description: Sutra — a local-first academic workspace for students: notes, assignments, planning, review, and an optional context-aware AI assistant. Runs as a single static web app.
author: Tanuj Ranjith

scripts.check: node scripts/smoke-check.mjs && node scripts/round-trip-check.mjs && node scripts/version-history-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-rebrand-check.mjs
scripts.check:static: node scripts/syntax-check.mjs && node scripts/smoke-check.mjs && node scripts/round-trip-check.mjs && node scripts/version-history-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-rebrand-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-compat-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-responsive-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-brand-assets-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-docbg-check.mjs
scripts.check:all: npm run check:static && npm run check:browser
